items.title: Late Wednesday night, after the Spurs had suffered unmitigated heartbreak at the Garden, Keldon Johnson approached each player remaining in the locker room and whispered a single word:
items.author: Jeff McDonald
items.body_excerpt:
Late Wednesday night, after the Spurs had suffered unmitigated heartbreak at the Garden, Keldon Johnson approached each player remaining in the locker room and whispered a single word:

"Believe."

Belief is all the Spurs have left. It still might not be enough.

www.expressnews.com/sports/spurs...

media.title: One word sums up the Spurs' approach to a do-or-die Game 5: 'Believe.'
media.description: Down 3-1 in the NBA Finals after blowing an historic lead in Game 4, the Spurs' season is on life support as series shifts back to San Antonio.

items.title: When OG Anunoby was 8, he begged his father, a finance professor, for a basketball hoop.
items.author: NBA Stat
items.body_excerpt:
When OG Anunoby was 8, he begged his father, a finance professor, for a basketball hoop.

Dr. Anunoby asked his son what sort of return he expected on his investment.

OG's pitch: buy it, and I'll practice every single day. 20 years later, the returns are still compounding.

(via Dovi Safier)
#NBA

items.title: Kelsey Plum, through 9 games, is averaging 24.8 points, 6.9 assists, and 1.6 steals. Only player in WNBA history to put together a 9-game stretch hitting those marks. She’s done it on a 68.6 TS%. Plum is shooting 89% inside the restricted area and 41% on 3s.
items.author: Justin Russo
items.body_excerpt: Kelsey Plum, through 9 games, is averaging 24.8 points, 6.9 assists, and 1.6 steals. Only player in WNBA history to put together a 9-game stretch hitting those marks. She’s done it on a 68.6 TS%. Plum is shooting 89% inside the restricted area and 41% on 3s.

items.body_excerpt:
🚨 TONIGHT 🚨

@jeffjsays.bsky.social joins me to discuss this INSANE NBA Finals as the Knicks are one win from immortality.

We'll discuss:

☑️ Wtf happened in Game 4
☑️ How the Knicks will close this out
☑️ What this title will mean in NYC
